# Jagath Kalupahana Photography — Studio Nethma

> Official portfolio and marketplace of Studio Nethma, a professional photography company in Ratmalana, Sri Lanka, founded and led by award-winning Senior Photographer Jagath Kalupahana. 12+ years of experience, 50+ global exhibitions, multiple international awards.

## Services

- Wedding photography (full coverage, team of photographers with distinct styles)
- Wildlife and nature photography
- Cricket and sports photography
- University graduation, convocation and batch photo day photography
- Corporate, school and event coverage
- Portrait and fine-art photography
- Limited edition fine-art prints (marketplace, worldwide shipping)

## Contact

- Email: studionethma@yahoo.com
- Phone: +94 777 901 129
- Address: No 144, Raja Mawatha, Ratmalana, Sri Lanka
- Available for assignments in Sri Lanka and internationally

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.jagathkalupahanaphotography.com/): Portfolio overview, about, achievements, FAQ
- [Gallery](https://www.jagathkalupahanaphotography.com/gallery): Full photography gallery, filterable by category and album
- [Work](https://www.jagathkalupahanaphotography.com/work): Selected work
- [Marketplace](https://www.jagathkalupahanaphotography.com/marketplace): Fine-art prints for purchase
